message:
feat(token_bucket): add operational telemetry counters [ft-3kxe.23]

Add TokenBucketTelemetry tracking acquires, refills, resets, and
rate_changes. Snapshot combines new telemetry with existing
total_consumed/total_denied for a complete picture. Includes
proptest suite with 13 unit tests + 5 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
